block_00: data download ke liye taiyar hai
block_02: GDPR ke Article 20 ke tahat apne vayaktigat data ka machine-readable partiyan pradaan karne ke liye aapke anurodh ke liye dhanyawaad.
block_03: Jis file ka aapne anurodh kiya hai jisme aapka
block_05: data shaamil hai, wah ab aapke dwara download kiye jaane ke liye taiyar hai. Kripya download karne ke liye yehan click karen. Suraksha kaarnon se, yeh email prapt hone ke baad file kewal 7 dino ke liye uplabdh rahegi.
block_06: Kyonki is file me vayaktigat jaankaari ho sakti hai jise aapko surakshit rakhna chahiye aur store karte ya bhejte samay ya ise kisi anya seva par upload karte samay saavdhaani rakhni chahiye.
block_10: Yadi aapke paas koi aur prashn hain, to kripya humen is email par bataayen
block_12: aur ham aapko adhik vivaran pradaan karenge.
